query: WITH expired AS ( SELECT ctid FROM oidc_login_flow_consumptions WHERE expires_at <= now() LIMIT $3 ), deleted AS ( DELETE FROM oidc_login_flow_consumptions consumption USING expired WHERE consumption.ctid = expired.ctid ) INSERT INTO oidc_login_flow_consumptions (flow_id, expires_at, consumed_at) SELECT $1, $2, now() WHERE $2 > now() ON CONFLICT (flow_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING flow_id
